title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Birlasoft International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Birlasoft International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Birlasoft International Enterprises in Gwalior offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birlasoft International Enterprises:
Birlasoft International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft International Enterprises!
